meaning: n.(=creese)(马来西亚和印尼的)波壮刃短剑
examples: Kris was praised by the Red Cross for his heroics.
Stepping toward the house, Kris nearly killed himself in the mud.
Kris and I love food, and our fridge is usually filled with tons of good stuff, so seeing the vast emptiness was almost shocking.
Samuel Sayer and Kris Pendlebury were earlier named as being from Bramdean and Ropley respectively.
Kris runs his own shop, which opens at 0400 GMT to catch the passing trade.
